name: Joe Froggers
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the first six ingredients together.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar well.
3. Beat in the molasses.
4. Add the dry ingredients and stir until well mixed.
5. Wrap the dough and chill.
6. Roll out half of the dough to a 1/4 inch thickness on a lightly floured board.
7. Cut with a lightly floured 3-inch cookie cutter.
8. Arrange cookies on a lightly greased cookie sheet.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
10. Cool on the cookie sheet for 1 to 2 minutes, or until set.
11. Remove from the cookie sheet using a wide spatula and cool on a wire rack.
12. Store in an airtight container.
